meta.title: Lumos Academy — Build. Create. Belong.
meta.description: Lumos Academy offers hands-on life skills enrichment for kids ages 5–14 in Dublin, Pleasanton, Livermore, and San Ramon. Afterschool programs and summer camps in art, woodworking, coding, drama, and more.
meta.keywords: kids enrichment Tri-Valley, afterschool programs Dublin CA, life skills kids Bay Area, summer camp Pleasanton, kids classes Livermore, STEAM enrichment San Ramon, Lumos Academy
meta.ogDescription: Hands-on life skills enrichment for kids ages 5–14 in the Tri-Valley, Bay Area. Afterschool programs and summer camps in art, woodworking, coding, drama, and more.
meta.ogImageAlt: Lumos Academy — kids enrichment programs in the Tri-Valley
meta.twitterDescription: Hands-on life skills enrichment for kids ages 5–14 in the Tri-Valley, Bay Area.

hero.description: Lumos Academy is a hands-on life skills enrichment program for kids ages 5–14 in Dublin, Pleasanton, Livermore & San Ramon. Every class is team-based, project-driven, and genuinely fun.

differentiators.title: Learning that actually sticks
differentiators.description: In a world of worksheets and screens, we do things differently. At Lumos Academy, kids make, move, and collaborate every single day.

items.title: Hands-On, Not Screen-On
items.description: Every class involves building, making, performing, or crafting. Kids work with real tools, real materials, and real challenges — not passive worksheets or videos.

items.title: Always in Teams
items.description: Unlike most enrichment programs, every Lumos Academy class is team-based. Students learn to lead, contribute, and support each other — skills that matter far beyond school.

items.title: Life Skills That Last
items.description: Sewing, woodworking, coding, speaking, dance, drama — we teach skills that build confidence, creativity, and capability for life, not just the next test.

courses.title: 12+ hands-on life skill courses
courses.description: From power tools to public speaking — our curriculum helps kids discover what they love and get really good at it.

items.title: Art & Illustration
items.description: Sketching, painting, and mixed media projects that turn ideas into visual stories. Teams create collaborative murals and gallery pieces.

items.title: Woodworking
items.description: Real tools, real wood, real projects. Kids learn measurement, safety, and craftsmanship while building birdhouses, shelves, and more.

items.title: Sewing & Textile
items.description: From hand-stitching to machine sewing, students design and create their own clothing, accessories, and soft sculptures.

items.title: Coding & Computational Thinking
items.description: Block-based and text coding through real games and apps. Teams build working projects and learn to debug together.

items.title: Public Speaking & Storytelling
items.description: Kids learn to structure ideas, own a room, and speak with confidence through team debates and TED-style talks.

items.title: Drama & Theater
items.description: Character development, script writing, and full team performances. Builds empathy, presence, and creative courage.

items.title: Dance & Movement
items.description: Choreography, rhythm, and body awareness. Teams create and perform original routines across multiple styles.

items.title: Critical Thinking
items.description: Logic puzzles, design challenges, and team debates. Builds reasoning skills kids use in every area of life.

items.title: Structured Play & Game Design
items.description: Teams invent, playtest, and refine their own board games and outdoor challenges. Play is the curriculum.

pricing.title: Choose the plan that fits your family
pricing.description: Flexible options for every schedule — from full daily enrichment to a single monthly class.

plans.title: Single Class Pass
plans.description: Try a specific skill — great for exploring what your child loves before committing to more.

plans.title: Full Month Program
plans.description: The full Lumos Academy experience — 5 hours a day, 5 days a week, across all life skill courses.

plans.title: Summer Intensive
plans.description: Immersive week-long camps with a new theme each week — building, performing, and creating all day.

pricing.noteText: Financial aid and sibling discounts available.

howItWorks.title: Getting started is simple
howItWorks.description: From sign-up to first class — we make the process easy for busy Tri-Valley families.

steps.title: Choose Your Plan
steps.description: Pick the program that fits your family's schedule — full month, single class, or summer camp.

steps.title: Select Your Courses
steps.description: Browse 12+ life skill courses and pick the ones your child is most excited about.

steps.title: Meet Your Team
steps.description: On day one, your child joins a small team of peers and an expert instructor.

steps.title: Watch Them Thrive
steps.description: See your child build real skills, lasting friendships, and confidence that comes from doing hard things together.

team.title: Passionate educators. Real makers.
team.description: Our instructors aren't just teachers — they're artists, engineers, performers, and craftspeople who bring authentic expertise to every class.

footerLink.label: We'd love to hear from you.

faq.title: Questions parents ask us most
faq.description: We know you have questions before entrusting us with your child. Here are the ones we hear most often.

items.q: What age range does Lumos Academy serve?
items.a: Lumos Academy serves children ages 5–14, covering kindergarten through middle school. Our curriculum is structured by age group so the content and team dynamics are developmentally appropriate for every child.

Every project at Lumos Academy is completed as a team of 4–6 kids. Rather than each child working alone, they divide responsibilities, solve problems together, and share their work as a group. This mirrors how adults work in the real world — and makes learning much more engaging and memorable.
We maintain a maximum of 14 students per instructor. This ensures every child gets personal attention and that teams are small enough to be genuinely collaborative.

Lumos Academy serves the Tri-Valley area, with families from Dublin, Pleasanton, Livermore, and San Ramon. Our exact address will be announced before our Fall 2026 launch. Join our waitlist to be the first to know.

items.q: What happens if my child misses a class?
items.a: We understand kids get sick and life happens. We offer one makeup session per month for Full Month Program members. Please contact us at least 24 hours in advance when possible.

items.q: Do you offer sibling discounts or financial aid?
items.a: Yes — we offer a sibling discount for families enrolling more than one child, and we have a limited number of need-based financial aid spots for each session. Please contact us directly to discuss what's available.

items.q: Can I cancel or change my plan?
items.a: Yes. The Single Class Pass can be paused or cancelled with 5 days' notice before your next billing cycle. The Full Month Program requires 10 days' notice before the next month begins.

items.q: When does the Fall 2026 program start?
items.a: We are targeting September 2026, following local school district calendars. Summer intensive camps are planned for July 2026. Exact dates will be emailed to everyone on our waitlist first.
